commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The remaining action is contributor real behavior proof plus maintainer judgment on linked-issue close scope, not a narrow code repair that automation can safely complete.; Cleared: No security or supply-chain sensitive files, dependencies, workflows, permissions, secrets, or downloaded code paths are changed. (sha=5ec1dc451154f08c43ea34290360f7f4cf08a0c3)
commands.review_summary:
The branch normalizes persisted reply-time session and parent model overrides, carries a stale/disallowed reset reason into the reset system event, and adds regression tests for provider-qualified stale override handling.

PR surface: Source +35, Tests +95. Total +130 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level, but not with a live browser/dashboard run. Current main lacks the reply-time normalization and uses the old allowlist-rejection formatter, while the PR adds targeted regression tests for the direct and parent stored override cases.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining action is contributor real behavior proof plus maintainer judgment on linked-issue close scope, not a narrow code repair that automation can safely complete.

target.title: fix(reply): clarify stale model override resets
target.body:
Fixes #94713.

## Summary

- normalize persisted session model overrides before reply-time stored override resolution/reset checks
- apply the same normalization to parent-session fallback and stale auto-fallback reset comparisons
- make the reset system event distinguish stale session state from true allowlist rejection, so users are not told to add a model that is already configured

## Why

Issue #94713 reports a dashboard child-session rollover where `openai/gpt-5.5` was configured and allowed, but the reply system event still said the model override was not allowed and suggested adding it to `agents.defaults.models`.

The narrow source-level failure is the reply reset/diagnostic path: stale stored session state can be cleared through the same message formatter used for real allowlist rejections. This PR keeps the broader dashboard child-session inheritance contract unchanged and only fixes stored-override normalization plus the user-facing reset reason.

## Verification

Light local check only:

- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`

GitHub Actions targeted proof:

- Baseline repro branch: `repro/model-override-normalization-94713`
  - Run: https://github.com/snowzlmbot/openclaw/actions/runs/27800996578
  - Result: failed as expected
  - Key failure: stale session override test received the old misleading message:
    - `Model override openai/gpt-5.5 is not allowed for this agent; reverted to openai/gpt-5.4. Add openai/gpt-5.5 to agents.defaults.models or pick an allowed model with /model list.`
- Fixed branch: `fix/model-override-normalization-94713`
  - Run: https://github.com/snowzlmbot/openclaw/actions/runs/27800997282
  - Result: passed
  - Targeted command:
    - `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/auto-reply/reply/model-selection.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/get-reply-directives-apply.test.ts -t "provider-qualified|stale session overrides"`
  - Result summary: `2 passed`, `4 passed` targeted tests

## Risk

Low. The change is limited to stored model override normalization and reset-event wording. It does not change the dashboard/WebChat child-session parent inheritance contract.


## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior or issue addressed:** Stale dashboard/session model override reset now reports the real stale-session cause instead of incorrectly saying an already-configured `openai/gpt-5.5` model is not allowed and telling users to add it to `agents.defaults.models`.

- **Real environment tested:** GitHub-hosted Ubuntu runner executing the patched OpenClaw checkout from `snowzlmbot:fix/model-override-normalization-94713` at `5ec1dc451154f08c43ea34290360f7f4cf08a0c3` with Node 24.16.0 through the repository setup action. The proof used the actual OpenClaw reply/model-selection code paths in the checkout and captured terminal output from the run.

- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:**

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run \
  src/auto-reply/reply/model-selection.test.ts \
  src/auto-reply/reply/get-reply-directives-apply.test.ts \
  -t "provider-qualified|stale session overrides"
```

- **Evidence after fix:**

Linked terminal output from the after-fix run: https://github.com/snowzlmbot/openclaw/actions/runs/27800997282

Copied terminal output excerpt from the after-fix run:

```text
CHECKOUT_REF: fix/model-override-normalization-94713
HEAD is now at 5ec1dc45 fix(reply): normalize persisted model overrides before reset
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/auto-reply/reply/model-selection.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/get-reply-directives-apply.test.ts -t "provider-qualified|stale session overrides"
✓ unit-fast ../../src/auto-reply/reply/get-reply-directives-apply.test.ts (3 tests | 2 skipped) 3ms
✓ auto-reply ../../src/auto-reply/reply/model-selection.test.ts (59 tests | 56 skipped) 326ms
Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests       4 passed | 58 skipped (62)
```

For comparison, the same proof harness against the baseline repro branch failed with the old misleading message: https://github.com/snowzlmbot/openclaw/actions/runs/27800996578

```text
CHECKOUT_REF: repro/model-override-normalization-94713
HEAD is now at a09aaa5a test(reply): reproduce provider-qualified stored override reset
FAIL ../../src/auto-reply/reply/get-reply-directives-apply.test.ts > formatModelOverrideResetEvent > does not tell users to edit the allowlist for stale session overrides
AssertionError: expected 'Model override openai/gpt-5.5 is not …' to be 'Stored model override openai/gpt-5.5 …'
Expected: "Stored model override openai/gpt-5.5 is stale for this session; reverted to openai/gpt-5.4. Pick a model again with /model if you still want to override the default."
Received: "Model override openai/gpt-5.5 is not allowed for this agent; reverted to openai/gpt-5.4. Add openai/gpt-5.5 to agents.defaults.models or pick an allowed model with /model list."
```

- **Observed result after fix:** The after-fix runtime output shows the stale-session reset message path and provider-qualified model-selection regression both passing on the patched checkout; the baseline branch fails on the exact stale-session message mismatch reported in #94713.

- **What was not tested:** Full live browser dashboard rollover timing was not exercised in this PR. The code change intentionally stays narrow: stored-override normalization and reset diagnostics only; it does not change the broader WebChat/dashboard child-session inheritance contract.
target.author: snowzlmbot

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
